perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a man in an orange and black patterned snowboarding outfit sitting on a snowy slope. He stands up and begins to snowboard down the hill. (2) A series of clips show him navigating different parts of the ski resort, alternating between smooth riding and occasional falls where he rolls in the snow. He is seen practicing turns and maintaining balance. (3) Other snowboarders and skiers are visible in the background against a backdrop of snow-covered mountains and trees under a clear blue sky. (4) The final sequence shows him reaching a flat area near a building, coming to a stop, and falling back onto the snow with a wide smile, followed by a close-up of him gesturing a thumbs-up and shouting excitedly towards the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio starts with wind noise and the sound of snowboard edges scraping on snow, mixed with a male voice shouting 'Checking the results' in Chinese. (2) An upbeat, high-tempo pop/rock background music track with prominent drums and electric guitar begins and continues throughout the video. (3) Intermittent sound effects of whooshing and impacts are heard during the snowboarding clips. (4) The video ends with the music reaching a crescendo as the man cheers loudly, accompanied by the sound of muffled wind and nearby ambient voices at the bottom of the slope.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative text at the top: '蔡阿嘎雪齡8小時。成果驗收' (Cai A-ga, 8 hours of snowboarding experience. Results check), emotional and informative tone. (2) Functional text overlay: '成果驗收' (Checking results), emphasizing the goal of the video.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator, approximately 7 other skiers/snowboarders visible in the background across various shots.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Adult male wearing a black and white patterned jacket with orange accents, orange snow pants, a black helmet, and goggles.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Wide open snowy slopes, deciduous trees without leaves, mountain ranges in the distance, and ski resort base buildings.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To document and share the progress of the creator's snowboarding skills after only 8 hours of practice. The video serves as entertainment and personal milestone sharing, showcasing both the successes and the humorous struggles (falls) of learning a new sport.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: While brands like Burton are visible, the content is framed as a personal vlog/travel diary rather than a sponsored advertisement.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy shouting '成果驗收' (checking results) and expressive facial gestures typical of the creator Cai A-ga.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses fast-paced editing and upbeat music to create a sense of accomplishment, typical of social media 'challenge' or 'progress' content.
